name: jtgp
description: Private plugin marketplace for spec-anchored, autonomous engineering workflows across multiple engagements. Adapts to any engagement via interactive setup.

plugins.name: jtgp-core
plugins.description: Core workflow: setup, spec-anchored phasing, adversarial planning, autonomous execution, evidence-based verification. Adapts to GitHub/GitLab/Notion, Outline/Notion KB, and any language configuration.
